device_smoke.notes: Set result to pass only after the XR launch, permissions, capture, finalization, and upload-queue flow are verified on the stated device.

app_distribution_smoke.notes: Set result to pass only after a tester installs the release candidate from App Distribution and opens the Android XR path.

quality_guidelines_review.notes: Set result to pass only after review against current Android XR quality guidance.

public_distribution_claims.notes: Keep false until Android XR distribution for audio/display glasses is explicitly available and proven for Blueprint.
